Can't find the ds4 engine

      
DStudio can install ds4 into this repo and apply its local patches, or connect to a LAN host already running DStudio.

      
Looked in:

System check

      
Checking local setup…

      

      

      

        
        
      

    

  

  
    

      

        

          
Welcome to DStudio

          
Local chat, agent and design for DeepSeek V4. Install ds4 here, then add a model.

        

        

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          

            
            

              
              
              
            

            

          

        


        

          

            checking…
            
          

          
Install ds4 into this DStudio repo to avoid manual paths and keep local patches reproducible.

        


        

          

            
Model

            
          

          
Optional for onboarding — the GGUF weights live in the engine folder.

          

        


        

          
Context size

          
How much the model keeps in mind per session. 64k is a good default; raise it for long agent or design work (DeepSeek V4 goes up to 1M).

          
        


        

          
        

      


      

        

          
Connect to LAN

          
Enter the LAN address shown by the Mac running DStudio. This client keeps its own chats and workspaces, while Chat, Agent and Design use the host model.

          
          

        

        

          

            
Local DS4 runtime

            
          

          
Required on this device for Agent and Design workspace tools. Chat still uses the LAN host model.

          

            ./ds4
          

          

        

      

    

  

  
    

      

        

          
          
            Preferences
            Settings
          
        

        
      


      

        

          
Connection

          
          
          
          

            Model the GGUF the engine loads — picking another restarts it
            

          

          
          
          
        


        

          
Generation

          
          
          
        


        

          
Interface

          

            Theme
            

              
              
              
            

          

          
          
          

            Connect to LAN use a DStudio host on the same network
            

              
              
            

            
Use this on the client machine. Chat uses the LAN host model; this machine keeps its own history and workspace. Agent and Design stay local to this device and never use the host filesystem.

            

          

        


        

          
Data

          

            Conversations removes every local conversation
            
            
Wipes the chat / agent / design history on this machine, plus the on-disk model cache (KV) when the engine is idle. This cannot be undone.

          

        


        

          
Maintenance

          

            

              
                Update Doctor
                Fetch ds4 upstream, then verify managed tools, templates, patch gates, skills and Open Design imports.

            LAN client
            Connection
          
        
    
        
      
    
      
    
        
    
          
    Host
    
          
    
            LAN address DStudio host used by this client
            
    
              
              
            
    
            
    This client keeps its own local chats, app state and workspaces. Chat, Agent and Design use the LAN host model. Agent and Design still need the managed local DS4 runtime on this device.
    
            
    
          
    
          
    
            Local DS4 runtime managed in this DStudio repo
            
    
              ./ds4
              
            
    
            
    The LAN host supplies the model. This local checkout supplies Agent/Design binaries, JSONL runtime and filesystem tools, so your files never move to the host.

            Agent
            Your skills
          
        
    
        
      
    
      
    
        
    Skills you write here are yours — the agent ships with none. Pick one in the composer gear to load it for the session, or the agent loads any of them on demand with its skill tool.
